summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (A11y icon removal from header), REQ-2 (dark text labels in header), and REQ-3 (site-wide high-contrast dark text). The Header.tsx no longer imports or renders an Accessibility icon/button. Dark text colors (#000000, #1A1A1A) are applied across header controls, navigation, footer, and all page components. Global CSS and Tailwind config are updated with dark foreground tokens and ink color palette. The light background theme is preserved.

hallucinated_features.description: Added 'ink' color token palette to Tailwind config with values ink.DEFAULT (#000000), ink.dark (#1A1A1A), ink.medium (#222222), ink.soft (#333333)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request asked to update CSS custom properties and/or Tailwind config to enforce dark text values, but adding a new named 'ink' token palette was not explicitly requested — only updating foreground text colors to #000000/#1A1A1A/#222222 was required.
